Resource Profile: AS Practitioner Profile

Official URL: http://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire-donnee-publique/StructureDefinition/as-practitioner Version: 0.0.3
Active as of 2023-05-04 Computable Name: ASPractitionerProfile

Profil créé à partir de la ressource Practitioner dans le contexte de l’Annuaire Santé pour décrire les données d’identification pérennes d’une personne physique, qui travaille en tant que professionnel (professionnel enregistré dans RPPS ou ADELI), personnel autorisé ou personnel d’établissement, dans les domaines sanitaire, médico-social et social.

Usage:

  • This Resource Profile is not used by any profiles in this Implementation Guide

Formal Views of Profile Content

Description of Profiles, Differentials, Snapshots and how the different presentations work.

  • Text Summary
  • Differential Table
  • Snapshot Table
  • Snapshot Table (Must Support)
  • All

This structure is derived from FrPractitioner

Summary

Must-Support: 14 elements
Fixed Value: 1 element

Structures

This structure refers to these other structures:

  • AS Mailbox MSS Datatype Profile (http://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire-donnee-publique/StructureDefinition/as-mailbox-mss)
  • As Address Extended Profile (http://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire-donnee-publique/StructureDefinition/as-address-extended)
  • CodeableConceptTimed (https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/codeableConcept-timed)

Extensions

This structure refers to these extensions:

  • https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitioner-nationality
  • https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitioner-authorization
  • https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitioner-birthPlace
  • https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitioner-deceasedDateTime

Slices

This structure defines the following Slices:

  • The element Practitioner.telecom is sliced based on the value of pattern:code

This structure is derived from FrPractitioner

NameFlagsCard.TypeDescription & Constraints
​ Practitioner 0..*FrPractitionerA person with a formal responsibility in the provisioning of healthcare or related services | Prestataire de santé
​ practitioner-nationality S0..1(Complex)[DR] : nationalite
URL: https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitioner-nationality
​ practitioner-authorization S0..*(Complex)[DR] : autorisationExercice
URL: https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitioner-authorization
​ practitioner-birthPlace S0..1FrAddressExtended[DR] : lieuNaissance
URL: https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitioner-birthPlace
​ practitioner-deceasedDateTime S0..*dateTime[DR] : dateDeces
URL: https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitioner-deceasedDateTime
​ identifier S0..*IdentifierUne instance par identifiant (RPPS, ADELI, idNat_PS…)
​ type 1..1CodeableConcepttypeIdNat_PP
Binding: fr-practioner-identifier-type (extensible): ValueSet défini par Interop’Santé « fr-practioner-identifier-type

​ system 1..1urile système de l'identifiant dépend de la source d'où provient l'identifiant
​ value 1..1stringidPP
​ active S0..1booleanisActive
​ name S0..*FrHumanNameUne instance pour le nom d’usage et une instance pour le nom issu de l’état-civil
​ use 0..1codeusual | official | temp | nickname | anonymous | old | maiden
​ family 0..1string[DR] : nomFamille/nomUsage
​ given 0..*string[DR] : prenom/prenomUsuel
​ prefix 0..1stringcivilite
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J78-Civilite-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J78-Civilite-RASS (required): Civilités des personnes physiques du RASS

​ Slices for telecom S0..*FrContactPoint[DR] : telecommunication
Slice: Unordered, Open by pattern:code
telecom:All Slices Content/Rules for all slices
​ system 1..1codephone | fax | email | pager | url | sms | other
​ use 0..1codehome | work | temp | old | mobile - purpose of this contact point
​ telecom:mailbox-mss 0..*AsMailboxMSSboiteLettreMSS
​ address S0..*AsAddressExtendedProfile[DR] : adresseCorrespondance
​ gender S0..1code[DR] : sexeAdministratif
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/TRE_R249-Sexe/FHIR/TRE-R249-Sexe (required)
​ birthDate S0..1date[DR] - dateNaissance
​ photo S0..*AttachmentImage of the person
​ qualification S0..*BackboneElementQualifications obtained by training and certification/Diplômes
​ code
​ coding:degreeR36 0..*CodingautreDiplomeObtenu
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J105-EnsembleDiplome-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J105-EnsembleDiplome-RASS (required): Autre diplôme obtenu

​ coding:degreeR47 0..*Codingqualification
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J105-EnsembleDiplome-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J105-EnsembleDiplome-RASS (required): Qualification attribuée par une commission

​ coding:degreeR48 0..*CodingDiplomeEtat
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J105-EnsembleDiplome-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J105-EnsembleDiplome-RASS (required): Ensemble des diplômes et qualifications

​ coding:degreeR49 0..*CodingDiplomeEtudeSpecialisee
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J105-EnsembleDiplome-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J105-EnsembleDiplome-RASS (required): Ensemble des diplômes et qualifications

​ coding:degreeR50 0..*CodingDESC1
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J105-EnsembleDiplome-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J105-EnsembleDiplome-RASS (required): Ensemble des diplômes et qualifications

​ coding:degreeR51 0..*CodingDESC2
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J105-EnsembleDiplome-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J105-EnsembleDiplome-RASS (required): Ensemble des diplômes et qualifications

​ coding:degreeR52 0..*CodingcapaciteDiplome
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J105-EnsembleDiplome-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J105-EnsembleDiplome-RASS (required): Diplôme de capacité de médecine

​ coding:degreeR53 0..*CodingDiplomeEEE
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J105-EnsembleDiplome-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J105-EnsembleDiplome-RASS (required): Diplôme d'un pays de l'espace économique européen

​ coding:degreeR54 0..*CodingDiplomeUniversitaire
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J105-EnsembleDiplome-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J105-EnsembleDiplome-RASS (required): Diplôme universitaire ou interuniversitaire

​ coding:degreeR55 0..*CodingcertificatEtudeSpeciale
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J105-EnsembleDiplome-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J105-EnsembleDiplome-RASS (required): Certificat d'études spéciales (CES)

​ coding:degreeR56 0..*Codingattestation
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J105-EnsembleDiplome-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J105-EnsembleDiplome-RASS (required): Attestation de formation

​ coding:degreeR57 0..*CodingDiplomeEES
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J105-EnsembleDiplome-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J105-EnsembleDiplome-RASS (required): Diplôme européen d'études spécialisées

​ coding:degreeR58 0..*CodingDiplomeDivers
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J105-EnsembleDiplome-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J105-EnsembleDiplome-RASS (required): Autre type de diplôme obtenu

​ coding:degreeR226 0..*CodingdiplomeDeuxiemeCycleNonQualifiant
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J105-EnsembleDiplome-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J105-EnsembleDiplome-RASS (required): Diplôme de deuxième cycle non qualifiant

​ coding:degreeType 0..*CodingtypeDiplome
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J81-TypeDiplome-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J81-TypeDiplome-RASS (required): Liste des types de diplôme


​ issuer
​ identifier 0..1IdentifierCode du lieu d'obtention du diplôme
​ system 0..1uriThe namespace for the identifier value
Fixed Value: urn:oid:1.2.250.1.213.1.6.4.1
​ communication S0..*CodeableConceptTimedlangueParlee
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J82-Langue-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J82-Langue-RASS (required)

Documentation for this format
NameFlagsCard.TypeDescription & Constraints
Practitioner 0..*FrPractitionerA person with a formal responsibility in the provisioning of healthcare or related services | Prestataire de santé
id Σ0..1idLogical id of this artifact
meta ΣN0..1MetaMetadata about the resource
implicitRules ?!Σ0..1uriA set of rules under which this content was created
language 0..1codeLanguage of the resource content
Binding: CommonLanguages (preferred): A human language.

Additional BindingsPurpose
AllLanguagesMax Binding
text N0..1NarrativeText summary of the resource, for human interpretation
contained 0..*ResourceContained, inline Resources
Slices for extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
practitioner-nationality S0..1(Complex)[DR] : nationalite
URL: https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitioner-nationality
practitioner-authorization S0..*(Complex)[DR] : autorisationExercice
URL: https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitioner-authorization
practitioner-birthPlace S0..1FrAddressExtended[DR] : lieuNaissance
URL: https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitioner-birthPlace
practitioner-deceasedDateTime S0..*dateTime[DR] : dateDeces
URL: https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitioner-deceasedDateTime
modifierExtension ?!N0..*ExtensionExtensions that cannot be ignored
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
identifier SΣ0..*IdentifierUne instance par identifiant (RPPS, ADELI, idNat_PS…)
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
use ?!Σ0..1codeusual | official | temp | secondary | old (If known)
Binding: IdentifierUse (required): Identifies the purpose for this identifier, if known .

type Σ1..1CodeableConcepttypeIdNat_PP
Binding: fr-practioner-identifier-type (extensible): ValueSet défini par Interop’Santé « fr-practioner-identifier-type

id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
coding ΣN0..*CodingCode defined by a terminology system
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
system Σ0..1uriIdentity of the terminology system
Example CodeSystem HL7v2 (PAM) pour un type d'identifiant PS: http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v2-0203
Example CodeSystem ASIP pour un type d'identifiant d'un employé dans une structure: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/TRE_G08-TypeIdentifiantPersonne/FHIR/TRE-G08-TypeIdentifiantPersonne
version Σ0..1stringVersion of the system - if relevant
code Σ0..1codeSymbol in syntax defined by the system
display Σ0..1stringRepresentation defined by the system
userSelected Σ0..1booleanIf this coding was chosen directly by the user
text Σ0..1stringPlain text representation of the concept
system Σ1..1urile système de l'identifiant dépend de la source d'où provient l'identifiant
Example General: http://www.acme.com/identifiers/patient
Example Pour un PS identifié à partir de sa carte CPS: urn:oid:1.2.250.1.71.4.2.1
Example Pour un employé identifié au sein de sa structure, OID de l'établissement suivi de la branche de gestion des employés ou: http://hopitalTest.fr/fhir/namingsystem/employes
value Σ1..1stringidPP
Example General: 123456
period ΣCN0..1PeriodTime period when id is/was valid for use
assigner ΣCN0..1Reference(Organization)Organization that issued id (may be just text)
active SΣ0..1booleanisActive
name SΣ0..*FrHumanNameUne instance pour le nom d’usage et une instance pour le nom issu de l’état-civil
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
Slices for extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
assemblyOrder N0..1codePreferred display order of name parts
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/humanname-assembly-order
Binding: HumanNameAssemblyOrder (required): A code that represents the preferred display order of the components of a human name.


use ?!Σ0..1codeusual | official | temp | nickname | anonymous | old | maiden
Binding: NameUse (required): The use of a human name.

text Σ0..1stringText representation of the full name
family Σ0..1string[DR] : nomFamille/nomUsage
given Σ0..*string[DR] : prenom/prenomUsuel
This repeating element order: Given Names appear in the correct order for presenting the name
prefix Σ0..1stringcivilite
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J78-Civilite-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J78-Civilite-RASS (required): Civilités des personnes physiques du RASS


This repeating element order: Prefixes appear in the correct order for presenting the name
suffix Σ0..*stringjeu de valeurs pour spécifier le titre de la personne
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J79-CiviliteExercice-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J79-CiviliteExercice-RASS (extensible): Civilités d'exercice d'un professionnel du RASS


This repeating element order: Suffixes appear in the correct order for presenting the name
period ΣCN0..1PeriodTime period when name was/is in use
Slices for telecom SΣC0..*FrContactPoint[DR] : telecommunication
Slice: Unordered, Open by pattern:code
telecom:All Slices Content/Rules for all slices
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
Slices for extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
emailType N0..1CodingType of email | type de messagerie électronique
URL: http://interopsante.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/FrContactPointEmailType
Binding: fr-email-type (extensible)
system ΣC1..1codephone | fax | email | pager | url | sms | other
Binding: ContactPointSystem (required): Telecommunications form for contact point.


Example le CodeSystem associé au jeu de valeurs: http://hl7.org/fhir/contact-point-system
value Σ1..1stringThe actual contact point details
use ?!Σ0..1codehome | work | temp | old | mobile - purpose of this contact point
Binding: ContactPointUse (required): Use of contact point.

rank Σ0..1positiveIntSpecify preferred order of use (1 = highest)
period ΣCN0..1PeriodTime period when the contact point was/is in use
telecom:mailbox-mss C0..*AsMailboxMSSboiteLettreMSS
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
Slices for extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
emailType N0..1CodingType of email | type de messagerie électronique
URL: http://interopsante.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/FrContactPointEmailType

identifier N0..*IdentifierAn identifier for this qualification for the practitioner
code N1..1CodeableConceptCoded representation of the qualification
Binding: v2 table 0360, Version 2.7 (example): Specific qualification the practitioner has to provide a service.

Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J105-EnsembleDiplome-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J105-EnsembleDiplome-RASS (required): Attestation de formation

extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
system Σ0..1uriAttestation
Fixed Value: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/TRE_R56-Attestation/FHIR/TRE-R56-Attestation

system Σ0..1uriAutre type de diplôme
Fixed Value: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/TRE_R58-AutreTypeDiplome/FHIR/TRE-R58-AutreTypeDiplome

extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
system Σ0..1uriDiplôme de 2ième cycle non qualifiant
Fixed Value: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/TRE_R226-Dip2iemeCycleNQ/FHIR/TRE-R226-Dip2iemeCycleNQ
version Σ0..1stringVersion of the system - if relevant
code Σ0..1codeSymbol in syntax defined by the system
display Σ0..1stringRepresentation defined by the system
userSelected Σ0..1booleanIf this coding was chosen directly by the user
coding:degreeType Σ0..*CodingtypeDiplome

text Σ0..1stringPlain text representation of the concept
period CN0..1PeriodPeriod during which the qualification is valid
issuer CN0..1Reference(Organization)Organization that regulates and issues the qualification
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
reference ΣC0..1stringLiteral reference, Relative, internal or absolute URL
type Σ0..1uriType the reference refers to (e.g. "Patient")
Binding: ResourceType (extensible): Aa resource (or, for logical models, the URI of the logical model).

identifier Σ0..1IdentifierCode du lieu d'obtention du diplôme
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
use ?!Σ0..1codeusual | official | temp | secondary | old (If known)
Binding: IdentifierUse (required): Identifies the purpose for this identifier, if known .

type ΣN0..1CodeableConceptDescription of identifier
Binding: Identifier Type Codes (extensible): A coded type for an identifier that can be used to determine which identifier to use for a specific purpose.

system Σ0..1uriThe namespace for the identifier value
Fixed Value: urn:oid:1.2.250.1.213.1.6.4.1
value Σ0..1stringThe value that is unique
Example General: 123456
period ΣCN0..1PeriodTime period when id is/was valid for use
assigner ΣCN0..1Reference(Organization)Organization that issued id (may be just text)
display Σ0..1stringText alternative for the resource
communication S0..*CodeableConceptTimedlangueParlee
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J82-Langue-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J82-Langue-RASS (required)

Documentation for this format

This structure is derived from FrPractitioner

Summary

Must-Support: 14 elements
Fixed Value: 1 element

Structures

This structure refers to these other structures:

  • AS Mailbox MSS Datatype Profile (http://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire-donnee-publique/StructureDefinition/as-mailbox-mss)
  • As Address Extended Profile (http://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire-donnee-publique/StructureDefinition/as-address-extended)
  • CodeableConceptTimed (https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/codeableConcept-timed)

Extensions

This structure refers to these extensions:

  • https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitioner-nationality
  • https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitioner-authorization
  • https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitioner-birthPlace
  • https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitioner-deceasedDateTime

Slices

This structure defines the following Slices:

  • The element Practitioner.telecom is sliced based on the value of pattern:code

Differential View

This structure is derived from FrPractitioner

language 0..1codeLanguage of the resource content
Binding: CommonLanguages (preferred): A human language.

AllLanguagesMax Binding
text N0..1NarrativeText summary of the resource, for human interpretation
contained 0..*ResourceContained, inline Resources

identifier SΣ0..*IdentifierUne instance par identifiant (RPPS, ADELI, idNat_PS…)
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
use ?!Σ0..1codeusual | official | temp | secondary | old (If known)
Binding: IdentifierUse (required): Identifies the purpose for this identifier, if known .

type Σ1..1CodeableConcepttypeIdNat_PP
Binding: fr-practioner-identifier-type (extensible): ValueSet défini par Interop’Santé « fr-practioner-identifier-type

id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
coding ΣN0..*CodingCode defined by a terminology system
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
system Σ0..1uriIdentity of the terminology system
Example CodeSystem HL7v2 (PAM) pour un type d'identifiant PS: http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v2-0203
Example CodeSystem ASIP pour un type d'identifiant d'un employé dans une structure: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/TRE_G08-TypeIdentifiantPersonne/FHIR/TRE-G08-TypeIdentifiantPersonne
version Σ0..1stringVersion of the system - if relevant
code Σ0..1codeSymbol in syntax defined by the system
display Σ0..1stringRepresentation defined by the system
userSelected Σ0..1booleanIf this coding was chosen directly by the user
text Σ0..1stringPlain text representation of the concept
system Σ1..1urile système de l'identifiant dépend de la source d'où provient l'identifiant
Example General: http://www.acme.com/identifiers/patient
Example Pour un PS identifié à partir de sa carte CPS: urn:oid:1.2.250.1.71.4.2.1
Example Pour un employé identifié au sein de sa structure, OID de l'établissement suivi de la branche de gestion des employés ou: http://hopitalTest.fr/fhir/namingsystem/employes
value Σ1..1stringidPP
Example General: 123456
period ΣCN0..1PeriodTime period when id is/was valid for use
assigner ΣCN0..1Reference(Organization)Organization that issued id (may be just text)
active SΣ0..1booleanisActive
name SΣ0..*FrHumanNameUne instance pour le nom d’usage et une instance pour le nom issu de l’état-civil
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
Slices for extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
assemblyOrder N0..1codePreferred display order of name parts
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/humanname-assembly-order
Binding: HumanNameAssemblyOrder (required): A code that represents the preferred display order of the components of a human name.


use ?!Σ0..1codeusual | official | temp | nickname | anonymous | old | maiden
Binding: NameUse (required): The use of a human name.

text Σ0..1stringText representation of the full name
family Σ0..1string[DR] : nomFamille/nomUsage
given Σ0..*string[DR] : prenom/prenomUsuel
This repeating element order: Given Names appear in the correct order for presenting the name
prefix Σ0..1stringcivilite
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J78-Civilite-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J78-Civilite-RASS (required): Civilités des personnes physiques du RASS


This repeating element order: Prefixes appear in the correct order for presenting the name
suffix Σ0..*stringjeu de valeurs pour spécifier le titre de la personne
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J79-CiviliteExercice-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J79-CiviliteExercice-RASS (extensible): Civilités d'exercice d'un professionnel du RASS


This repeating element order: Suffixes appear in the correct order for presenting the name
period ΣCN0..1PeriodTime period when name was/is in use
Slices for telecom SΣC0..*FrContactPoint[DR] : telecommunication
Slice: Unordered, Open by pattern:code
telecom:All Slices Content/Rules for all slices
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing

emailType N0..1CodingType of email | type de messagerie électronique
URL: http://interopsante.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/FrContactPointEmailType

system ΣC1..1codephone | fax | email | pager | url | sms | other

Example le CodeSystem associé au jeu de valeurs: http://hl7.org/fhir/contact-point-system
value Σ1..1stringThe actual contact point details
use ?!Σ0..1codehome | work | temp | old | mobile - purpose of this contact point

rank Σ0..1positiveIntSpecify preferred order of use (1 = highest)
period ΣCN0..1PeriodTime period when the contact point was/is in use

id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
system Σ0..1uriDiplôme de 2ième cycle non qualifiant

code Σ0..1codeSymbol in syntax defined by the system
display Σ0..1stringRepresentation defined by the system
userSelected Σ0..1booleanIf this coding was chosen directly by the user
coding:degreeType Σ0..*CodingtypeDiplome

text Σ0..1stringPlain text representation of the concept
period CN0..1PeriodPeriod during which the qualification is valid
issuer CN0..1Reference(Organization)Organization that regulates and issues the qualification
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
reference ΣC0..1stringLiteral reference, Relative, internal or absolute URL
type Σ0..1uriType the reference refers to (e.g. "Patient")
Binding: ResourceType (extensible): Aa resource (or, for logical models, the URI of the logical model).

identifier Σ0..1IdentifierCode du lieu d'obtention du diplôme
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
use ?!Σ0..1codeusual | official | temp | secondary | old (If known)
Binding: IdentifierUse (required): Identifies the purpose for this identifier, if known .

type ΣN0..1CodeableConceptDescription of identifier
Binding: Identifier Type Codes (extensible): A coded type for an identifier that can be used to determine which identifier to use for a specific purpose.

system Σ0..1uriThe namespace for the identifier value
Fixed Value: urn:oid:1.2.250.1.213.1.6.4.1
value Σ0..1stringThe value that is unique
Example General: 123456
period ΣCN0..1PeriodTime period when id is/was valid for use
assigner ΣCN0..1Reference(Organization)Organization that issued id (may be just text)
display Σ0..1stringText alternative for the resource
communication S0..*CodeableConceptTimedlangueParlee
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J82-Langue-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J82-Langue-RASS (required)

Documentation for this format

 

Other representations of profile: CSV, Excel, Schematron

Constraints

IdGradePath(s)DetailsRequirements
att-1errorPractitioner.photoIf the Attachment has data, it SHALL have a contentType
: data.empty() or contentType.exists()
cpt-2errorPractitioner.telecom, Practitioner.telecom:mailbox-mssA system is required if a value is provided.
: value.empty() or system.exists()
ele-1error**ALL** elementsAll FHIR elements must have a @value or children
: hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())
ext-1errorPractitioner.extension, Practitioner.extension:practitioner-nationality, Practitioner.extension:practitioner-authorization, Practitioner.extension:practitioner-birthPlace, Practitioner.extension:practitioner-deceasedDateTime, Practitioner.modifierExtension, Practitioner.identifier.extension, Practitioner.identifier.type.extension, Practitioner.identifier.type.coding.extension, Practitioner.name.extension, Practitioner.name.extension:assemblyOrder, Practitioner.telecom.extension, Practitioner.telecom.extension:emailType, Practitioner.telecom:mailbox-mss.extension, Practitioner.telecom:mailbox-mss.extension:emailType, Practitioner.qualification.extension, Practitioner.qualification.modifierExtension, Practitioner.qualification.code.extension, Practitioner.qualification.code.coding:degreeR36.extension, Practitioner.qualification.code.coding:degreeR47.extension, Practitioner.qualification.code.coding:degreeR48.extension, Practitioner.qualification.code.coding:degreeR49.extension, Practitioner.qualification.code.coding:degreeR50.extension, Practitioner.qualification.code.coding:degreeR51.extension, Practitioner.qualification.code.coding:degreeR52.extension, Practitioner.qualification.code.coding:degreeR53.extension, Practitioner.qualification.code.coding:degreeR54.extension, Practitioner.qualification.code.coding:degreeR55.extension, Practitioner.qualification.code.coding:degreeR56.extension, Practitioner.qualification.code.coding:degreeR57.extension, Practitioner.qualification.code.coding:degreeR58.extension, Practitioner.qualification.code.coding:degreeR226.extension, Practitioner.qualification.issuer.extension, Practitioner.qualification.issuer.identifier.extensionMust have either extensions or value[x], not both
: extension.exists() != value.exists()
per-1errorPractitioner.identifier.period, Practitioner.name.period, Practitioner.telecom.period, Practitioner.telecom:mailbox-mss.period, Practitioner.qualification.period, Practitioner.qualification.issuer.identifier.periodIf present, start SHALL have a lower value than end
: start.hasValue().not() or end.hasValue().not() or (start <= end)
ref-1errorPractitioner.identifier.assigner, Practitioner.qualification.issuer, Practitioner.qualification.issuer.identifier.assignerSHALL have a contained resource if a local reference is provided
: reference.startsWith('#').not() or (reference.substring(1).trace('url') in %rootResource.contained.id.trace('ids'))
